form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of four-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second of 7 at Lyon-Parilly November 22 over 3800m, on rain affected going; 3.5 len behind Al Fonce carrying 68kg at $28. Previously first up; second in a small field at Wissembourg April 13 over 2400m, soft track; 0.8 len behind Lavriot Star carrying 63kg. Can get the job done.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-16.5). Is first-up after a break of four-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Previously first up; second in a small field at Wissembourg April 13 over 2400m, soft track; 0.8 len behind Lavriot Star carrying 63kg. Can get the job done.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 16 at Durtal on March 22 over 2900m, 1.75 len behind Mississipi carrying 67kg. The run before that 5th of 16 at Durtal on March 22 over 2900m, 1.75 len behind Mississipi carrying 67kg. Encouraging effort last start. Likely to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). At the latest run 5th of 16 at Durtal on March 22 over 2900m, 1.75 len behind Mississipi carrying 67kg. The run before that 5th of 16 at Durtal on March 22 over 2900m, 1.75 len behind Mississipi carrying 67kg. Encouraging effort last start. Likely to feature.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at Fontainebleau in the G2 November 22 over 2600m, soft track; 20 len behind Louisa Banbou carrying 64kg at $31. When resuming last campaign third of 11 at Le Lion-d'angers May 29 over 2400m, soft track; 2.25 len behind Lady Magic carrying 62kg at $50. Can play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Mare back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 44-day let-up. First-up after four months 2nd of 10 at Machecoul on February 22 over 2950m, on a wet track; 9 len behind Lester carrying 66.5kg at $18. Previously second-up ran last of 11 at Sabl?-sur-Sarthe on August 31 over 2850m, on a slow track; 57 len behind Lets Danse Doudou carrying 67kg. Capable of giving a great sight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Second-up. Comes off a 44-day let-up. First-up after four months 2nd of 10 at Machecoul on February 22 over 2950m, on a wet track; 9 len behind Lester carrying 66.5kg at $18. Previously second-up ran last of 11 at Sabl?-sur-Sarthe on August 31 over 2850m, on a slow track; 57 len behind Lets Danse Doudou carrying 67kg. Capable of giving a great sight.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 54-day let-up. First-up after three months 6th of 9 at Angers on February 12 over 3000m, 19 len behind Lebrio Des Mottes carrying 65kg at $10. Previously second-up won by a head at Durtal November 9 over 2900m in soft going defeating Lande D'oudairies with 62.5kg. Not the worst in this, could find a place.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. Comes off a 54-day let-up. First-up after three months 6th of 9 at Angers on February 12 over 3000m, 19 len behind Lebrio Des Mottes carrying 65kg at $10. Previously second-up won by a head at Durtal November 9 over 2900m in soft going defeating Lande D'oudairies with 62.5kg. Not the worst in this, could find a place.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign fourth in a small field at Angers November 16 over 2300m, 8 len behind Malissa Mans with 63kg at $29. On debut fourth of 9 at Corlay July 14 over 2300m, 2.25 len behind Me Voila La Mome with 65kg. Should be ready to run well.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last campaign 6th of 13 at Morlaix on March 30 2025 over 2600m, slow going 16 len behind Lato Kaleo carrying 62.5kg. First up last campaign 4th of 7 at Angouleme on October 20 2024 over 2600m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Louisville with 60.5kg. Likely to need this outing.

form.formComment: At debut, 11th of 14 at Saumur on March 8 over 2700m, 15 len behind Little Lulu with 61.5kg. Don't think she will trouble this field.
